final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey), reimagined in the nostalgic warmth of 1990s Hong Kong cinema.

Style/medium: film poster in the romantic melancholy of 1990s Hong Kong cinema, with the soft grain and faded color memory of theatrical release prints
Composition: wide cinematic frame, the lovers centered in the foreground embrace, secondary figures positioned in the distant background creating layered depth
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in a tender embrace and kiss on the ancient city wall, 牛魔王 standing in the middle distance watching, 唐僧 further back as a small silhouette
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese city wall at dusk, the sky vast and fading into memory
Lighting/mood: the golden hour of a love that cannot last, soft diffused light with the wistfulness of endings
Color palette: warm amber and rose tones fading into cool distant blues, the chromatic signature of 1990s Hong Kong romance
Materials/textures: 35mm film grain throughout, the gentle texture of theatrical print aging
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: all four characters must be visually present, 至尊宝 and 紫霞 as the emotional center in embrace, 牛魔王 and 唐僧 in the background hierarchy
Avoid: modern digital polish, oversaturated colors, contemporary poster design clichés, Western blockbuster aesthetic
